The canonical source material for any Mirodan/Laban verification work:

1. `/Users/opaque/Downloads/nigel-session-2026-04-28/mirodan-ch1-basic-concepts.md` — chapter 1 (foundational concepts, motion factors)
2. `/Users/opaque/Downloads/nigel-session-2026-04-28/mirodan-ch2-attitudes.md` — chapter 2 (Inner Attitudes — Stable, Near, Adream, Mobile, Remote, Awake)
3. `/Users/opaque/Downloads/nigel-session-2026-04-28/mirodan-ch3-drives.md` — chapter 3 (Drives — Doing/Spell/Passion/Vision + the X-diagram)
4. `/Users/opaque/Downloads/nigel-session-2026-04-28/mirodan-ch4-applications.md` — chapter 4 (Applications to character analysis)
5. `/Users/opaque/Downloads/nigel-session-2026-04-28/laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28.md` — 1-page (actually ~1000-line) operator synthesis of the PDF
6. `/Users/opaque/Downloads/Mirodan-PhD-1997-Vol2.pdf` — primary source PDF (~1000 pages, vol 2 only — vol 1 PDF not on disk; the per-chapter markdown extracts above ARE the vol 1 content)

**Why:** On 2026-05-19 I told the operator that Mirodan vol 1 chapters 1-4 weren't on disk and so my CharacterSheet verification was mediated through drive-mapping.md + the 1-page synthesis. The operator corrected me — the chapter content IS available as these 5 markdown extracts. I'd missed them because they live in `~/Downloads/nigel-session-2026-04-28/` (Nigel-session artifacts), not under any project tree.

**How to apply:**
- Before claiming a Mirodan/Laban citation, check these 6 files first.
- For any future voice-spec verification (Infinex, Cream, ProjectJin, Nigel, future brands), audit against these as primary sources.
- `drive-mapping.md` is a derived reference — useful as a quick-lookup index but NOT a substitute for the chapter material when verifying specific claims about Inner Attitudes / Aspects / Stresses / Drives.
- The operator-locked Infinex spec (`src/voice/infinex.ts`) cites the 1-page synthesis (`laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28.md`) — that's the operator's working substrate. Cross-checking against the chapter files catches any drift the synthesis introduced.
- See [[infinex-character-image-banker-trailblazer]] and [[infinex-drive-spell-not-passion]] for the locks these sources back.
